benchmarks.title: The Constraint Gauntlet
benchmarks.tagline: Counting is not writing: exact word counts, lipograms, acrostics, and other mechanically checkable constraints.
benchmarks.thesis: Can a model actually obey a hard countable constraint — count its own words, ban a letter, hold an acrostic — or does it merely gesture at the instruction? The grader is mechanical; the score is pure obedience. Content quality is deliberately unscored: read the outputs.
